text: Why the cargo pump in the Framo cannot be overloaded?

options.text: The pressure of hydraulic oil to the motor driving the cargo pump is designed in such a way that, the flow is always kept constant
The pressure of hydraulic oil to the motor driving the cargo pump is designed in such a way that, the pump runs at the optimum speed
The pressure of hydraulic oil to the motor driving the cargo pump is designed in such a way that, when the pump over speeds, the flow of oil is reduced

The pressure of hydraulic oil to the motor driving the cargo pump is designed in such a way that, the pressure can run the pump at 75% of the capacity **Correct answer : The pressure of hydraulic oil to the motor driving the cargo pump is designed in such a way that, the pump runs at the optimum speed**
